mapper.insert:
SELECT product_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO Product (productno, memberno, adminno, product_name, product_description, product_point, cnt, image_url) VALUES (#{productno}, #{memberno}, #{adminno}, #{product_name}, #{product_description}, #{product_point}, #{cnt}, #{image_url})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM Product WHERE productno = #{productno} AND adminno = #{adminno}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM Product ORDER BY productno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE Product SET cnt = cnt - 1 WHERE productno = #{productno} AND cnt > 0
